per_criterion_scores.internal_note: The student did not explicitly identify economic agents such as consumers and producers.
The student provided a general context but lacked specificity in linking assumptions and constraints to the organic vegetable market.
The student specified assumptions and constraints well, though they could be more directly tied to the economic context.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding by identifying some key issues but lacked specificity in economic context and did not explicitly identify economic agents.
